plugins.description: Google Workspace orchestration for Claude Code. Multi-account access to Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides, Contacts, Tasks, Forms, and Chat. Ships 14 cross-service workflow commands plus 10 service skills. Wraps taylorwilsdon/google_workspace_mcp.
